creator: pavlo@cs.wisc.edu
text:
This is finally a working patch to upgrade Condor to the latest stable version 6.8.8. I would like to get this committed as soon as possible because the 6.8.4 binaries are no longer available on the web. This patch also fixes the pointyhat problem that was reported to me way back during the summer.

I will be submitting a patch to the upcoming 7.0.0 release later in the month. This has FreeBSD-specific fixes that I made before I left for graduate school.

Fix: Patch included

Patch attached with submission follows:
